primary_reference.citation: Eriksson et al. 1992, cavity-creating mutations in T4 lysozyme.

note: Report effect.direction as a literature-calibrated direction and use submitted short comparative MD metrics as local consistency evidence. Run WT and L99A trajectories and report quantitative differences (core SASA, cavity volume, packing density, C-alpha RMSF near residue 99, hydrophobic contact count, etc.) in metrics.md_analysis and evidence_report.evidence.md_metrics. Do not claim that short MD alone proves the experimental delta-delta-G.
